title: Art appraisers in Charleston, South Carolina

location.name: Art appraisers in Charleston, South Carolina
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Charleston, South Carolina.

listedAppraisers.name: DJR Authentication
listedAppraisers.description: DJR Authentication provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Fine Art, Antiques, Contemporary Art. With 2012 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: LePrince Fine Art
listedAppraisers.description: LePrince Fine Art provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Art Consultation, Framing, Commissions. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: AppraiseItNow
listedAppraisers.description: AppraiseItNow provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Fine Art, Collectibles, General Art Appraisals (excluding jewelry). With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in European Art, American Art, Contemporary, Modern, Impressionist, 19th-century Art. With Decades experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Escher Associates
listedAppraisers.description: Escher Associates provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Paintings, Sculpture, Photography, Rare Books. With Founded in 1984 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Page Art, Inc.
listedAppraisers.description: Page Art, Inc. provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Insurance Appraisals, Estate Appraisals, Donation Appraisals, Litigation Appraisals. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Saylor Rice Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Saylor Rice Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Insurance Appraisals, Damage/Loss Appraisals. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Gurr Johns
listedAppraisers.description: Gurr Johns provides professional art appraisal services specializing in High-value Art Appraisals, Expert Witness Services. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: The Art Syndicate (Janette Doering)
listedAppraisers.description: The Art Syndicate is a boutique fine art appraisal service founded by Janette Doering, an ISA member since 2013. The firm offers professional valuations for charitable donations, cultural property donations, equitable distribution, estate valuations, and insurance. Serving the Charleston, South Carolina area with expertise in fine art appraisal standards.

listedAppraisers.name: Mimesis Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Mimesis Gallery provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Valuations, Consignment-based Sales. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.
